testcase.name: test_worker_system_status

failure.message: AssertionError: Worker status returned 404 assert 404 in [200, 401, 403] + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration107_regression.py:35: in test_worker_system_status assert response.status_code in [200, 401, 403], f"Worker status returned {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Worker status returned 404 E assert 404 in [200, 401, 403] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
